channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 71/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 71/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 68.5%.

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: Lots of talk of Streeting and Burnham being at war over Europe but their statements were actually very similar. Streeting: "one day back in the European Union. Burham: "In the long term there is a case for [rejoining...
item.description: Lots of talk of Streeting and Burnham being at war over Europe but their statements were actually very similar. Streeting: "one day back in the European Union. Burham: "In the long term there is a case for [rejoining...

item.title: ConservativeHome: Shadow Cabinet League Table: Badenoch tightens her grip on the Tory party
item.description: Shadow Cabinet League Table: Badenoch tightens her grip on the Tory party

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Streeting reopening Brexit wars by calling for UK return to EU ‘a bit odd,’ says Nandy
item.description: Politics latest: Streeting reopening Brexit wars by calling for UK return to EU ‘a bit odd,’ says Nandy

item.title: The Telegraph: Starmer’s public defiance masks fury over betrayal by closest allies - The Telegraph

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): UK’s next ambassador to Japan may be called to give evidence in Mandelson inquiry

item.title: The Guardian: Andy Burnham faces perilous race to win Makerfield byelection, allies say - The Guardian

item.title: The Times: Angela Rayner rejects No 10’s plan to make her health secretary - The Times

item.title: The Telegraph: Burnham retreats on push to rejoin EU - The Telegraph
